questions.question: How do manufacturing industries contribute to economic growth?
questions.answer: By increasing production, employment and exports.

questions.question: Why do industries prefer locations near raw material sources?
questions.answer: To reduce transportation costs and ensure continuous supply.

questions.question: Which type of industry provides raw materials for other industries?
Why is the iron and steel industry called a feeder industry?
questions.answer: Because it supplies raw materials for many other industries.

questions.question: What is the approximate ratio of raw materials used in steel production?
Why is aluminium considered a good substitute for copper and steel?
questions.answer: Because it is lightweight, corrosion resistant and a good conductor.

questions.question: Why does aluminium smelting require large amounts of electricity?
questions.answer: Because extracting aluminium from bauxite requires high energy.

questions.question: Why are most jute mills located near the Hugli River?
questions.answer: Due to availability of raw jute, water, labour and transport facilities.

questions.question: Which factor helped the growth of the automobile industry after liberalisation?
questions.answer: Introduction of modern vehicle models and increased demand.

questions.question: Which industrial gases mainly cause air pollution?
Which industries mainly cause water pollution by releasing dyes and chemicals?
What type of pollution occurs when hot water from industries enters rivers?
Which device removes particulate matter from industrial smoke?
Why is recycling industrial wastewater important?
questions.answer: It reduces freshwater pollution and conserves water resources.

questions.question: Which concept ensures industrial growth without damaging the environment?
Why is balanced regional industrial development necessary?
questions.answer: To reduce economic disparities between regions.

questions.question: Which property of aluminium makes it suitable for aircraft manufacturing?
Which type of chemicals are used to produce plastics and synthetic fibres?
Which fertilizer nutrient is largely imported by India?
Why are cement industries located near limestone deposits?
questions.answer: Because limestone is the main raw material used in cement production.

questions.question: Which organisation manages major power plants and promotes environmental management?
Which measure reduces noise pollution in industries?
What is the main aim of pollution control measures in industries?
questions.answer: To reduce environmental damage caused by industrial activities.

questions.question: Which factor strongly influences industrial location?
questions.answer: Availability of raw materials and power.

questions.question: Which technology helps industries reduce emissions and conserve resources?
